testcase.name: test_tt_attendance_report

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: <element(s) not found> Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("table.k-selectable tbody tr").first

testcase.failure: tests\Timetracking\test_TT_Attendance_Report.py:12: in test_tt_attendance_report expect(admin_page.locator("table.k-selectable tbody tr").first).to_be_visible() E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: <element(s) not found> E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("table.k-selectable tbody tr").first
